posts.title: Hello-World
posts.text: 不同语言的Hello world c123456#include <stdio.h>int main(){ printf("Hello world"); return 0;} c++123456#include <iostream>int main(){ std::cout<<"Hello world"; return 0;} Python31print("Hello world") Python21print "Hello world" C#12345678910namespace HelloWorld{ class HelloWorld { static void Main() { System.Console.WriteLine("Hello world"); } }} Java12345public class HelloWorld { public static void main(String[] args) { System.out.println("Hello World"); }} Go1234567package mainimport "fmt"func main(){ fmt.Println("Hello World")} Shell1echo "hello world" PHP1Hello world BrainFuck1++++++++[>++++[>++>+++>+++>+<<<<-]>+>+>->>+[<]<-]>>.>---.+++++++..+++.>>.<-.<.+++.------.--------.>>+.>++. 文言1吾有一言。曰「「Hello World」」。書之。 Markdown1Hello World Malbolge1(=<`#9]~6ZY32Vx/4Rs+0No-&Jk)”Fh}|Bcy?`=*z]Kw%oG4UUS0/@-ejc(:’8dc
